title: Facilitator Guide — Day 8 — Professional Readiness
prepChecklist: Do NOT call this licensing — use Professional Readiness language
Confirm AIA Pre-Contract Training Course access for all participants
Prepare transition deck: discovery → professional responsibility
Estimated course time: 4 hours — complete before Friday

sessionFlow.notes: Good intentions are not enough. Every professional learns, practices, qualifies, serves.
SPIKE prepares entrepreneurs. AIA prepares professionals. Journeys connect this week.

sessionFlow.activity: Professional Readiness Mission — AIA LMS Pre-Contract Training
sessionFlow.notes: Participants complete course in SPIKE Studio. Upload evidence, mentor verification, or LMS integration.
What did you learn that will make you a better financial professional?

debriefQuestions: Who completed the Pre-Contract course today?
How does professional readiness connect to customer discovery?
Are squads ready for Thursday FEC Validation Lab?
commonPitfalls: Calling it licensing instead of professional readiness
Treating this as individual homework instead of squad milestone
coachingTips: Frame readiness as privilege and responsibility — not compliance
Badge and portfolio auto-sync on completion
Mentors verify completion for squads without upload access
